bundle.hint: Begin with architect-specialist, then hand off or call workflow-advance when Planning is complete.

orchestration.instruction:
ORCHESTRATION GUIDE for Planning phase:

1. START: Activate architect-specialist agent
   - Review agent playbook: .context/agents/architect-specialist.md
   - Understand responsibilities and outputs

2. DISCOVER: Find all agents for this phase
   - Call: agent({ action: "orchestrate", phase: "P" })
   - Review: Recommended agents and their roles

3. SEQUENCE: Plan agent handoff order
   - Call: agent({ action: "getSequence", phases: ["P"] })
   - Follow: Suggested sequence for optimal workflow

4. EXECUTE: Perform work and handoffs
   - Work: Complete tasks as architect-specialist
   - Handoff: workflow-manage({ action: "handoff", from: "architect-specialist", to: "<next-agent>", artifacts: [...] })
   - Repeat: Continue through sequence until phase complete

5. ADVANCE: Move to next phase
   - Call: workflow-advance({ outputs: [...] })
   - Review: Next phase orchestration guidance

recommendedSkills.name: feature-breakdown
recommendedSkills.description: Break down features into implementable tasks

recommendedSkills.name: api-design
recommendedSkills.description: Design RESTful APIs following best practices

orchestrationSteps: 1. Discover agents for Planning phase: agent({ action: "orchestrate", phase: "P" })
2. Review recommended sequence: agent({ action: "getSequence", phases: ["P"] })
3. Begin with architect-specialist agent - follow playbook at .context/agents/architect-specialist.md
4. Execute handoffs: workflow-manage({ action: "handoff", from: "architect-specialist", to: "documentation-writer", artifacts: ["output.md"] })
